text: You are at sea in an inflatable life raft in high altitudes, the greatest danger is:

options.text: Collapse of the raft due to cold temperatures
Asphyxiation due to keeping the canopy closed

explanation: In a survival craft, the lack of thermal protection and the inability to generate body heat in a wet environment makes hypothermia the primary killer. While cold can affect air pressure, the human physiological limit is the most critical factor.
